vulnerability.reference: Automated monitoring systems lack human-in-the-loop verification for AI-generated motion predictions.
vulnerability.generated: Security operators and automated monitors lack real-time verification to detect synthetic motion misrepresentations.

impact.reference: Missed security threats due to erased or altered suspicious behaviors in generated footage.
impact.generated: False situational assessments provoke incorrect security responses, wasting resources or missing real threats.

dose_response.reference: Decoder-only transformers generate misaligned motion in surveillance video, which, when relied upon by security personnel with automation bias, leads to false situational assessments.
dose_response.generated: Decoder-only transformer generating physically implausible or semantically misaligned video, through security-system reliance, triggers lack of real-time verification, leading to false situational assessments and incorrect responses that waste resources or miss real threats.
